refs.description: Widely used C library for fast, lightweight suffix array construction (divsufsort), the de facto reference implementation linked by many tools.
Rust suffix array/table built with the linear-time SA-IS algorithm plus LCP support, exposed as a searchable suffix table.
BWA genome aligner derives its FM-index/BWT from a suffix array to map DNA reads against reference genomes in production.
Succinct data structure library that constructs suffix arrays (via divsufsort/SAIS) as the basis for its compressed full-text indexes.
